description_short: Wichita is Kansas's largest city and sits squarely in Tornado Alley, with one of the highest annual tornado counts in the country.
description_long: Located in south-central Kansas on the Arkansas River, Wichita faces severe tornado and large-hail risk during the spring storm season, plus blizzards and ice storms in winter. Sedgwick County is served by NWS Wichita (office code ICT) within forecast zone KSZ083 (Sedgwick).
